---
title: "About"
filters:
    - coatless-quarto/pyodide
    - py-exercise
---

```{py-exercise}
def add(a, b):
    # Your solution here
    pass
## TESTS ##
assert add(1, 2) == 3,   "add(1, 2) should return 3"
assert add(-1, 1) == 0,  "add(-1, 1) should return 0"
assert add(0, 0) == 0,   "add(0, 0) should return 0"
```

<p> </p>
Blabla 

```{pyodide-python}
print("hello world")

```
